---
name: Skill request
about: Propose a new skill or category
title: "[skill request] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Category**
`backend` / `frontend` / `mobile` / new category (name it)

**What should this skill do?**
Describe the workflow, conventions, or pattern it should teach an agent.

**When should it trigger?**
List concrete phrases a user might say that should invoke this skill (this becomes the `description` field).

**Reference material**
Links to docs, existing code conventions, or examples this skill should be based on.
